source_root: D:\OneDrive\Uganda National Road Network Repository\0. Manuals

topic_cards.decision_use: Condition survey completeness, monitoring tier and deterioration-trigger checks.
Traffic evidence, axle-load risk and road-user effects assumptions.
Climate, safety, environmental and social risk screening.
Readiness, work standards, BOQ, supervision and contract controls.
Policy, strategy, lifecycle planning and RAMS governance weighting.
Implementation capacity, user readiness and system administration.
Structure criticality, BMS evidence and bridge/culvert inspection gates.
QMP, validation, data acceptance and auditability scoring.
Route naming, linear referencing, network matrix and spatial QA checks.
